variants: Maahir Nazeer has established his residence at Cranesage Terrace, having been born in the vibrant community of Golden Orchard. He is celebrated for his inventive work, the Divining Lantern Mechanism, which contributed to his recognition as the recipient of the Ivory Eclipse Honor. A member of the Nightspire Glaziers Union, Maahir actively engages with fellow creatives in the glazing specialty, further enriching the shared knowledge and craftsmanship of the union.
